title: RAG pipeline
text: A retrieval augmented generation system indexes source documents, splits them into chunks, embeds each chunk as a vector, retrieves the most relevant chunks for a question, and returns grounded context before generation.

title: Vector search
text: Vector search stores numeric embeddings and compares a query vector with document vectors using cosine similarity or dot product. Recall at k measures whether a relevant document appears in the top retrieved results.

title: Local first cloud
text: The default demo path must run without paid credentials. AWS like behavior should be emulated locally with Kumo when cloud behavior is required, while real cloud providers stay behind ports and adapters.

title: Benchmark evidence
text: Portfolio repositories need one reproducible benchmark. For a RAG knowledge base the core numbers are recall at k, query latency in milliseconds, and cost per query in dollars.

title: FastAPI service
text: FastAPI exposes typed request and response models, automatic OpenAPI documentation, and a simple ASGI serving path with Uvicorn for local Docker demos.

title: Ports and adapters
text: Domain and use cases should not import framework, database, cloud SDK, broker SDK, or transport code. Adapters implement ports so local fakes and real providers obey the same contract.

title: Reuse improvement loop
text: Each project should ask whether the reuse kit can improve. Low risk reusable changes are patched immediately, broad changes go to backlog, and project specific abstractions are rejected.

title: Hashing embeddings
text: A hashing embedding provider creates deterministic local vectors from tokens without downloading a model. It is useful as a no secret baseline before plugging in sentence transformers or managed embeddings.
